description: Customizable canvas snowfall with density, wind drift, flake size, opacity, and fall direction.
keyFeatures: Canvas-rendered snowflakes with configurable density and speed ranges.
Per-flake wind drift with swaying motion and wrap-around edges.
Control flake radius, opacity, colour, and fall direction (down or up).
Optional backdrop colour with smooth transition timing.
Preview toggle for live animation vs a static canvas frame.
descriptionParagraphs: A customizable canvas snowfall: density, randomized speed, per-flake wind drift, size and opacity ranges, fall direction, colour and an optional backdrop.
Toggle Preview for live snow vs a static scene on the canvas.
